pages.raw_text:
In Spokane things were run by
representatives Of the Portland EN-
ployers' association. and the Los
Angeles anti-picket ordinance and
the Portland boycott ordinance
were introduced. In Spokane,
other fights with unions, like the
walters contest. were started and
managed by local representatives
of the Manufacturers association,
and the same attempt was made to
control the officials and police, to
terrorize the strikers. who were de-
MED arbitration or even a hearing.
that had marked the Oregon and
California contests.


In Tacoma, in Vancouver and In
Victoria the same program was at
tempted, but failed, the officials OF
| these cities not caring to take any
active and open part on behalf of
the local leaders of the Citizens
Alliance as they had done in Port
land and Los Angeles. In these
three last-named cities, despite
every effort of the big bosses, the
struggle settled down to straight
pull between capital and the work
ers without the outside interven-
ton of political bosses, big corpora
tons or the police.


BUT NOTICE THIS: THE
NATIONAL MANUFACTURERS
ASSOCIATION IN ALL THESE
NORTHWEST CITIES FORCED
STRIKES, REFUSED CONFER
ENCES OR ARBITRATION. COM
PEELED THE EMPLOYERS, d.
RECTLY CON Germ ED TO
LEAVE THEIR FIGHT IN OUT
SIDE HANDS, AND FINALLY. IN
EVERY CONTEST WITH LABOR
ENDEAVORED TO SEIZE THE
JUDICIARY. THE POLICE. THE
EXECUTIVE DEPARTMENTS
AND TO ENACT AND ENFORCE
LAWS THAT DIRECTLY AT
Tackled THE INHERENT RIGHT
OF ORGANIZATION AND FREE
SPEECH GIVEN US-SO WE
HAVE ALWAYS THOUGHT-BY
THE CONSTITUTION OF OUR
NATION!
